name: method-crispr-screens
rationale: Famous CRISPR-screen analysis tools (MAGeCK, BAGEL) dominate; long-tail target is recent tools and methodology critiques.

name: method-spatial-deconvolution
rationale: Field moves quickly; cell2location dominates citations but newer methods may be better â€” surface them.

name: target-brd4-vus
rationale: BRD4 chemistry-of-the-target plus negative-space queries should surface understudied PROTAC degraders and clinical failures.

name: phenotype-cytokine-storm
rationale: COVID-era publications dominate; obscure synonyms reach hemophagocytic-lymphohistiocytosis literature and earlier sepsis work.

name: method-ribosome-profiling-drug-response
rationale: Cross-domain transfer is the value: applications in plant/yeast/microbial systems map back to mammalian therapeutic biology.

name: target-vus-brca1
rationale: Famous variants dominate the literature; saturation-mutagenesis and functional-assay studies are under-cited gold.

name: method-single-cell-atac-integration
rationale: Three packages dominate; tools for niche analyses (e.g. peak-calling at low cell counts) live in the long tail.

name: phenotype-treatment-resistant-depression
rationale: Ketamine/esketamine trials dominate the recent literature; long-tail target is older mood-disorder phenomenology and reward-circuit work in non-human models.

name: phenotype-insulin-resistance-nafld
term: insulin resistance in non-alcoholic fatty liver disease
rationale: MASLD rebrand and GLP-1 trials dominate; obscure synonyms route around to mechanistic lipotoxicity work and pre-2010 metabolic flux studies.

name: phenotype-neural-tube-closure
rationale: Folate epidemiology dominates the popular literature; developmental-biology long tail is in PCP-signaling mouse and chick work.

name: phenotype-friedreich-ataxia
rationale: Rare-disease space: omaveloxolone approval is the loud signal; long-tail value is in iron-sulfur biogenesis mechanism, cardiomyopathy progression, and gene-therapy preclinical work.

name: phenotype-systemic-acquired-resistance
rationale: Suppresses canonical NPR1 receptor / methyl salicylate mobile signal Nature/Science papers in favor of long-tail mechanistic work on N-hydroxypipecolic acid biosynthesis, glycerol-3-phosphate transport, and lipid transfer protein-mediated long-distance signaling.

name: method-root-microbiome-synthetic-communities
rationale: Routes around the foundational Schlaepfer/Lundberg/Bulgarelli Nature root microbiome papers to surface niche work on drop-out community functional dissection, helper/keystone strain identification, and metabolic cross-feeding in defined SynComs.

name: target-nlr-immune-receptor-engineering
rationale: Suppresses the ZAR1 resistosome Science cryo-EM duo and AlphaFold-era structural work to surface the long-tail of integrated-decoy domain rewiring, MADA helper engineering, and synthetic LRR shuffling for novel effector recognition.

name: phenotype-bacterial-persister-cells
rationale: Routes around Balaban's foundational Science persister paper and Lewis's Nature toxin-antitoxin work to surface long-tail mechanistic literature on (p)ppGpp-polyphosphate-Lon axes, ribosome dimerization, and stochastic single-cell switching dynamics.

name: method-mycorrhizal-symbiosis-signaling
rationale: Suppresses the canonical Myc-LCO Nature paper and strigolactone discovery Science papers to surface long-tail work on lipid transfer to fungal partners, RAM1/RAM2 transcriptional networks, and decoding of nuclear calcium spiking signatures by CCaMK.

name: phenotype-industrial-melanism
rationale: The 2016 Nature paper identifying the cortex transposon and Majerus's textbook-famous bird predation experiments dominate; the long tail is parallel melanism in other Lepidoptera and modern population-genomic resequencing of museum specimens.

name: method-pool-seq-fst-scan
rationale: Schloetterer's Nature Reviews Genetics piece and the original PoPoolation papers dominate; the long tail is non-model wild populations (insects, fish stocks) where authors use idiosyncratic pipelines and rarely cite the rebranded method by name.

name: phenotype-cryptic-species-complex
rationale: Bickford et al. TREE 2007 and Pfenninger & Schwenk are the canonical citations and overwhelm DNA-barcoding-era results; the long tail is recent integrative-taxonomy revisions in invertebrates, nematodes, and fungi where the species pair was never famous.

name: target-supergene-inversion
rationale: The 2013/2016 Nature/Nat Genet papers on fire ant social chromosomes and ruff lekking morphs are the textbook hits; the long tail is mimicry-unrelated inversion supergenes in plants, snails, and seaweed flies that get cited far less.

name: method-resurrection-ecology
rationale: Hairston's Annual Review and the Daphnia phosphorus-adaptation Nature paper dominate citations; the long tail is resurrection work on copepods, rotifers, and plant seed banks, plus newer epigenetic re-analyses that don't use the canonical phrase.

name: method-toehold-switch-design
obscure_synonyms: trans-acting RNA repressor with linear-linear interaction
rationale: Routes around the canonical Green/Collins 2014 Cell toehold paper and the 2016 Zika sensor Cell paper to surface long-tail work on thermodynamic design rules, orthogonality failures, and host-context effects in less-cited journals.

name: phenotype-symmetry-breaking-gastruloid
synonyms: spontaneous AP axis formation in vitro
obscure_synonyms: stochastic Wnt focus formation in mESC clusters
embryonic organizer-like induction without extraembryonic tissue
rationale: Routes around the van den Brink/Martinez-Arias 2018 Nature gastruloid paper to surface long-tail work on the biophysics and stochasticity of T pole emergence, including failures-of-symmetry-breaking and rare-state literature in Development and bioRxiv.

name: target-bmp-signaling-threshold
rationale: Routes around the famous Gregor/Wieschaus Bicoid-style gradient interpretation papers and Affolter Dpp Cell reviews to surface long-tail mechanistic work on noise filtering, receptor saturation, and feedback in BMP signaling published in Development, eLife, and PLoS Biology.

name: method-orthogonal-translation-system
rationale: Routes around the Chin lab Nature 2015 Ribo-T paper and high-profile genetic code expansion Nature Chemical Biology hits to surface long-tail work on ribosome fitness costs, evolved 23S variants, and orthogonality leakage in less-cited microbiology venues.

name: phenotype-organoid-vascularization-failure
synonyms: lack of vasculature in cerebral organoids
obscure_synonyms: HIF1a-driven central apoptosis in 3D neural culture
non-CD31 stromal void in iPSC-derived neuroepithelium
rationale: Routes around the Lancaster/Knoblich 2013 Nature cerebral organoid paper and the 2019 Nature Methods vascularized organoid headline to surface long-tail work on hypoxia signatures, core necrosis quantification, and partial-perfusion troubleshooting in Stem Cell Reports and bioRxiv.

name: method-slide-seq-tissue-mapping
obscure_synonyms: DNA-barcoded bead arrays for transcriptome capture
rationale: Rodriques 2019 Science and the 2020 NBT V2 paper dominate retrieval; the long tail is downstream application papers using Slide-seq in disease-specific tissue atlases (kidney injury, MS lesions, tumor microenvironments) and methodological extensions to chromatin/protein co-capture.

name: method-cite-seq-surface-proteome
synonyms: cellular indexing of transcriptomes and epitopes
rationale: Stoeckius 2017 Nature Methods and Mimitou 2019 ECCITE papers are saturated hits; the long-tail target is clinical CITE-seq cohort studies (lupus PBMC panels, CAR-T product characterization, tumor-infiltrating lymphocyte panels) and underexplored ADT normalization/batch-correction methods.

name: method-imc-tumor-microenvironment
term: imaging mass cytometry of tumor microenvironment
rationale: Giesen 2014 NMeth (foundational IMC) and the Bodenmiller/Jackson 2020 Cell breast cancer atlas eclipse retrieval; the long tail is application papers in less-trafficked indications (pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma stromal niches, IBD mucosal biopsies, transplant rejection panels) and computational pipelines (Steinbock, ImcSegmentationPipeline alternatives).

name: method-expansion-microscopy-neural-circuits
term: expansion microscopy for neural circuit reconstruction
rationale: Chen/Boyden 2015 Science (original ExM) and the 2019 Science ExLLSM paper dominate; long-tail targets are protocol variants for hard tissues (bone, plant cell walls, pathogenic biofilms), quantitative validation studies of expansion isotropy, and applications outside the Boyden/Betzig labs in synaptic protein nanoscale organization.

name: method-spatial-atac-chromatin-mapping
rationale: The Fan-lab Nature 2022 spatial-ATAC and spatial-CUT&Tag pair are the canonical hits; long-tail recall should surface emerging method variants (spatial multimodal omics in clinical FFPE, integration with histopathology, plant/non-mammalian applications) and computational tools for spatial peak calling beyond the original DBiT framework.
